title: The Seraphim Turn the Battlefield
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Vegapunk, Sanji, Lilith, Unknown person #8, Nami as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This place is simply marvelous!! They have everything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes, we have a couple of issues...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Second, we've lost control of the frontier dome...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: As g. g. at. as a

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we tried to leave, the lasers would likely fry us.

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: Where's your Stella body... did something happen?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a neat?! How can we leave the island with vegapunk then?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quite. And the dome is really a secondary concern when you consider your main passenger is missing!!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: We should prioritize finding the Stella first!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll figure out a way to repair the dome in the meantime.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How are we meant to find him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he's not shown' up on any of your monitors?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, these displays do normally show the entire lab,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Must've incapacitated some of the baby monitor snails... or maybe they were just knocked out of position.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But that Seraphim rampage just now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm having our workers and the other satellites search for him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He might've passed out in a blind spot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Third floor of C Tower seems empty.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The sooner we can set sail. Let's go search...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll also take a look around,

dialogue.speaker: CP0
dialogue.text: Oooohhh!!' Stussy-sama, take me with youu!!')

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're looking for a geezer with a sawed-off head, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: YOU'RE GOING OUT TO FIND SOMEONE?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But who's gonna find you when you're done?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Just, be a dear and wait, okay?*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, they're just forming a search party, so I guess they'll be fine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, you must've been running all out, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I... always... go all out... for everything...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't believe we bumped into these guys again.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 60 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
